holdings.infoBox: ORCU is an equity ETF with a total of 14 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily ORCL Bull 2X ETF (ORCU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Oracle Corporation (NYSE: ORCL). ORCU was launched on Nov 19, 2025 and is issued by Direxion.
